rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and its note indicates broad topic-mapping (including emergence of “prosocial behavior”) rather than use of any specific referral-incentive mechanism or method. The cited paper is a specific empirical study on prosocial referral incentives, which in this context most plausibly serves as an illustrative/example article within the journal overview. With only a single DOI match and no evidence of substantive methodological/theoretical dependence, this looks like an incidental mention.
